subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee rest My Glory! The Greater Branch hath appeared before the Face with the letters which the loved ones have addressed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی غصن اکبر لدی الوجه حاضر با نامهای اولیا که بآنجناب نوشته اند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
